About Me

I am a second-year Computer Engineering student at the University of Science and Technology — The University of Danang. I have a strong interest in technology and am particularly fascinated by how software and hardware work together to create intelligent systems.

Throughout my academic journey, I have focused on building a solid foundation in programming, algorithmic thinking, and system design. Beyond formal education, I actively engage in self-learning through books, online resources, YouTube, and AI-assisted learning tools.

I believe that curiosity, responsibility, and persistence are essential qualities for continuous growth. Currently, I am especially interested in Semiconductor Technology and Artificial Intelligence applications on hardware platforms, and I hope to further explore these fields in the future.

Projects

🏛️
English Club Management System
A personal project developed in C++ to strengthen object-oriented programming skills and gain hands-on experience in designing a complete software system.
Main Features
User Authentication
Member Management
Event Management
Notification System
Role-Based Access Control
Technologies Used
C++
Object-Oriented Programming
Inheritance
Polymorphism
Encapsulation
File Handling
📄 700+ lines of code
🔗 Multiple interconnected classes
👤 Independently developed
💡 What I Learned
This project helped me gain practical experience in software architecture, class design, inheritance, polymorphism, and system organization. It also strengthened my problem-solving abilities and improved my confidence in independently developing software applications.

Career Interests

I am especially fascinated by the intersection between hardware and artificial intelligence, and I hope to contribute to the development of smarter and more efficient computing systems in the future.

⚡
Semiconductor Technology
Exploring the design and fabrication of semiconductor devices that power modern computing.
A field that fascinates me because it forms the foundation of modern computing systems.
🔌
Embedded Systems
Interested in developing software that runs directly on hardware with tight resource constraints.
Where software meets the physical world through hardware constraints.
🤖
AI on Hardware Platforms
Fascinated by deploying AI models directly on edge devices and hardware accelerators.
Exploring how AI can be efficiently integrated into hardware systems.
🧠
Intelligent Embedded Devices
Passionate about creating smart devices that combine sensing, processing, and decision-making.
Building devices that think and react to the world around them.
🔮
Future Computing Technologies
Eager to contribute to the next generation of computing systems that are smarter and more efficient.
Looking toward the horizon of what computing can become.

Personal Information

The book that introduced
me to reading
📚 Reading

Reading became one of my hobbies thanks to a recommendation from a close friend. The first book that truly sparked my interest was Howl's Moving Castle. Since then, I have explored a variety of genres and discovered how books can expand perspectives, encourage creativity, and provide valuable insights into different aspects of life.

🎵 Lofi & Indie Music

I enjoy listening to lofi and indie music. Their calm and soothing melodies help me focus while studying and provide a relaxing atmosphere during my free time. Music has become an important companion in my daily academic routine.

Lofi and indie music often accompany my study sessions.
⚽ Sports & Fitness
Team Sports
Football, basketball, and badminton — played mainly for recreation and teamwork, while maintaining an active lifestyle.
Home Fitness
Regular workouts with dumbbells and resistance bands — building discipline, improving well-being, and maintaining balance.
🔭 Technology Exploration

I enjoy exploring emerging technologies and learning about new developments in software, hardware, artificial intelligence, and engineering. Discovering unfamiliar topics and understanding how things work motivates me to keep learning continuously beyond the classroom.

Personal Strengths

📚
Self-Learning Ability
Actively seeks knowledge through books, online resources, and AI-assisted tools.
🧠
Logical Thinking
Approaches problems in a structured and analytical way to identify effective solutions.
🎯

Takes ownership of tasks and strives to complete them to the highest standard.
💪
Persistence
Invests time and effort to deeply understand difficult concepts rather than giving up.
🔄
Adaptability
Comfortable switching between independent work and effective team collaboration.

Challenges & Personal Growth

One challenge I have experienced is burnout during periods of intensive studying or prolonged workload. At times, this can reduce my motivation and productivity.

However, over time I have learned to recognize these situations and actively recover by engaging in activities that I enjoy — reading, listening to music, exercising, or exploring new topics that interest me.

This experience has taught me the importance of maintaining balance between productivity and personal well-being. It has also helped me develop greater self-awareness and resilience when dealing with stress and pressure.

Personal Philosophy & Motto

I believe that meaningful growth comes from consistent effort rather than sudden success. Every challenge, mistake, and learning experience contributes to personal development and helps build a stronger foundation for the future.

"
It does not matter how slowly you go as long as you do not stop.
— Confucius
Consistency matters more than speed.
